query:
INSERT INTO pricing (category, minPrice, maxPrice, description, active) VALUES
('Plastic (Mixed)', 1500, 3000, 'PET/HDPE better rates', 1),
('Paper/Cardboard', 1200, 2500, 'Dry cardboard pays more', 1),
('Mixed Metals', 4000, 9000, 'Aluminum/copper premium', 1),
('Glass Bottles', 200, 600, 'Clean, sorted only', 1),
('E-waste', 5000, 15000, 'Electronics and batteries', 1);
